prompts: Look, I have implemented it, but as there is no @CLAUDE.md on the top level, I don't think it will be added by default, am I right? If I am right, then please move @CLAUDE.md so it's visible and its corresponding changes are actual on repository level.

Another thing is I wanted to put it into, for example, the document folder, where there are a bunch of projects I'm not working with and a bunch of projects I am working with. From a single entry point, I want you to get each project, route to each project, and execute the corresponding commands, because each project has its own commands, its own.cloud folder with corresponding commands and skill.
